subcodes.first_line: O descendant of Abraham, the Friend of God! Thy letter hath been received, bearing the glad tidings of the attraction, unity, and concord amongst the loved ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سلیل حضرت ابراهیم خلیل نامه شما رسید و بشارت انجذاب و اتحاد و اتفاق احبا
subcodes.subjects: @interpretation of dreams and visions, @stories; anecdotes, @Manifestation of God as mirror, @constitutional revolution in Iran, @review of publications
